name: ExplorerLens Dev Container
postCreateCommand: pwsh -NoProfile -Command "Write-Host 'ExplorerLens dev container ready.' -ForegroundColor Green; Write-Host 'Build:  .\build-scripts\Build-MSVC.ps1' -ForegroundColor Cyan; Write-Host 'Test:   ctest --test-dir build -C Release --output-on-failure' -ForegroundColor Cyan; if (Test-Path '.githooks/pre-commit') { git config core.hooksPath .githooks; Write-Host 'Git hooks: .githooks/ configured' -ForegroundColor Green }"
_comment: ExplorerLens requires Windows containers (COM, WinRT, DirectX).
Local: Docker Desktop must be in Windows container mode.
- Visual Studio 2022 BuildTools (MSVC v143) via winget
- CMake, Ninja, NASM, 7zip via Scoop (features provide cmake+ninja as fallback)
Note: MSVC v145 (VS 2026) is NOT available in containers yet — v143 is used for CI.
Post-create: configures .githooks/ if present, prints build commands.
